'''Vuul''' was the [[President/Legends|President]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bri'ahl]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He made the decision to side with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] after [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Amidala]] visited the planet.

==Biography==
When Bri'ahlian President Vuul sought an alliance with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], he caused mixed feelings among his subjects, for which some of his kin that were Pro-Separatists, wanted to kill Vuul and [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] shortly before the treaty could be signed. This attempt was prevented by the droids R2-D2 and C-3PO by chance. Following this, Vuul once again expressed his loyalty to the Republic.
{{Char-stub}}
